nodes.name: Zfc Independence From Other Axioms
nodes.definition: The continuum hypothesis (CH) and the axiom of choice (AC) are independent of ZFC: both ZFC + CH and ZFC + ¬CH are consistent, as are ZFC + AC and ZFC + ¬AC (without choice, not AC). Gödel proved ZFC
